
I am committed to science communication, public engagement, and community-centered scholarship.

## Science outreach

### BrainsRule 2026

Brief description of the activity, your role, audience, and date.

### BrainsRule 2025

Brief description of another event or project.

## Community engagement

- Community activity, organization, year
- Community activity, organization, year

## Service

- Committee or service role, institution or organization, year
- Reviewer, journal/conference/organization, year
- Mentoring or advising activity, year
